recommendations.title: Sholay
recommendations.overview: After his family is slain by the notorious bandit Gabbar Singh, former Inspector Thakur Baldev Singh enlists low-level outlaws Jai and Veeru to capture Gabbar and seek revenge.

recommendations.title: Made
recommendations.overview: Two aspiring boxers and lifelong friends get involved in a money-laundering scheme through a low-level organized crime group.

recommendations.title: Grind
recommendations.overview: Four skaters follow their idol on his summer tour in an attempt to get noticed, get sponsored, and become stars themselves.

recommendations.title: Forrest Gump
recommendations.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

recommendations.title: Hot Seat
recommendations.overview: An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions, another man must try to penetrate the booby-trapped building to get the young man off the hot seat.

recommendations.title: The Constant Gardener
recommendations.overview: Justin Quayle is a low-level British diplomat who has always gone about his work very quietly, not causing any problems. But after his radical wife Tessa is killed he becomes determined to find out why, thrusting himself into the middle of a very dan

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: Left alone to clean up a 6-meter-deep deserted pool, Day falls asleep on an inflatable raft. When he wakes, the water level has sunk so low that he can't climb out on his own. Stuck in the pool, Day screams for help, but the only thing that hears him

recommendations.title: The Employment
recommendations.overview: A man prepares and goes to work in a bizarre world, where the meaning of human workforce is taken to another level.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Jolt
recommendations.overview: A bouncer with an anger management problem goes on a furious and resentful rampage after the murder of a friend.
